ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ble_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BLE event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the BLE event */,
  "le_subevent_code" TEXT /* LE subevent code associated with the event */,
  "bf_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the event is mandatory for Bluetooth Core (Y/N) */,
  "po_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the event is mandatory for Protocol Overhead (Y/N) */,
  "lo_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the event is mandatory for Link Layer Operations (Y/N) */,
  "bo_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the event is mandatory for Base Operations (Y/N) */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event category */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the device involved in the event */,
  "rssi" INTEGER /* Received Signal Strength Indicator for the event */,
  "tx_power" INTEGER /* Transmission power level */,
  "advertising_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the device advertises */,
  "connection_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the device maintains a connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ble_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ble_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_category ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin, developer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the BLE event being logged */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the event */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the device involved in the event */,
  "rssi" INTEGER /* Received Signal Strength Indicator for the event */,
  "tx_power" INTEGER /* Transmission power level */,
  "advertising_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the device advertises */,
  "connection_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the device maintains a connection */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_category ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES ble_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_category" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the BLE event associated with the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification is sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the notification (e.g., sent, acknowledged) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the device involved in the notification */,
  "rssi" INTEGER /* Received Signal Strength Indicator for the event */,
  "tx_power" INTEGER /* Transmission power level */,
  "advertising_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the device advertises */,
  "connection_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the device maintains a connection */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_category ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES ble_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_monitoring" (
  "monitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring setup */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the BLE event being monitored */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for triggering alerts */,
  "monitoring_status" TEXT /* Status of the monitoring setup (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the device being monitored */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_monitoring_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_category ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_monitoring_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES ble_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_monitoring_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
